name: nominatim_geocode
description: Geocode an address or place name, or reverse-geocode coordinates, using OpenStreetMap Nominatim.

q.description: Free-form address or place query (for example, 'Taipei 101', 'Eiffel Tower', '1600 Pennsylvania Ave').

street.description: Street address for structured query, used together with city and country.

country.description: Country name or ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for structured query.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-50).

addressdetails.description: Include detailed address components when set to 1.

countrycodes.description: Comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes restricting the search (for example, 'tw,jp,us').
